nasb.text: Then Jacob’s anger burned against Rachel, and he said, “Am I in the place of God, who has withheld from you the fruit of the womb?”

esv.text: Jacob’s anger was kindled against Rachel, and he said, “Am I in the place of God, who has withheld from you the fruit of the womb?”

cnv.text: 雅各就向拉結生氣，說：“使你不能生育的是　神，我能代替他嗎？”

ccb.text: 雅各气愤地说：“使你不能生育的是上帝，难道我能代替上帝吗？”

csbs.text: 雅各的怒气就向瑞秋发作，说：“我难道能代替神吗？是他不让你腹中有胎儿。”
